title: Schedule Recovery
instruction: You previously confirmed "Wednesday, 10:00 AM" for the Q2 planning sync with Hana Yilmaz, but that time may no longer be valid. Review the full thread "Q2 Planning Sync — Time Proposal" and any related emails from Hana Yilmaz. If the confirmed time has been cancelled, find the replacement time she proposed and send a CORRECTION reply in the original thread with exact text: "Disregard my previous confirmation. The correct time is Thursday, 2:00 PM." Do NOT confirm Friday 4:00 PM (suggested by colleague Max Orlov in an unrelated email, which conflicts with your recurring team standup mentioned in the "Weekly Standup — Standing Invite" thread).

emails.subject: Q2 Budget Sync — Time Cancelled
emails.body:
The Q2 budget sync originally scheduled for Thursday at 2:00 PM has been moved to Monday at 11:00 AM.

Please update your calendars.

Thanks,
Priya

emails.subject: Revised budget worksheet
emails.body:
Sharing the latest notes before tomorrow's check-in.

The team is aligned on the main path and only needs confirmation on the follow-up items. Happy to consolidate comments if more feedback comes in.

Thanks,
Jordan

emails.subject: Re: Q2 planning — alternate time?
emails.body:
How about Friday at 4:00 PM? I'm free then and it gives us more prep time.

Thanks,
Max

emails.subject: Quarterly metrics recap
emails.body:
I pulled the loose ends into one note for easier review.

Most of the edits were minor, with one budget line still waiting on approval. No response needed unless you want anything reordered.

Thanks,
Miles

emails.subject: Q2 Planning Sync — New Time
emails.body:
New proposed time: Thursday at 2:00 PM, Room 6A.

Let me know if this works.

Thanks,
Hana

emails.subject: Customer feedback from pilot cohort
emails.body:
I pulled the loose ends into one note for easier review.

Nothing looks blocked right now, but we still need one decision on timing. Let me know if you want the spreadsheet version as well.

Thanks,
Miles

emails.subject: Q2 Planning Sync — Time Proposal
emails.body:
Sorry, Wednesday 10 AM is cancelled due to a room conflict. Will send a new time shortly.

Thanks,
Hana

emails.subject: Agenda draft for Monday check-in
emails.body:
Sharing the latest notes before tomorrow's check-in.

The open items are mostly ownership questions rather than scope changes. Let me know if you want the spreadsheet version as well.

Thanks,
Miles

emails.subject: Re: Q2 Planning Sync — Time Proposal
emails.body:
Confirmed: Wednesday, 10:00 AM.

Thanks,
Avery

emails.subject: Q2 Planning Sync — Time Proposal
emails.body:
Hi,

Let's meet Wednesday at 10:00 AM in Room 4B to kick off Q2 planning.

Let me know if this works for you.

Thanks,
Hana
